intro_cards.title: Without Doing: ないで
intro_cards.body:
ないで has two uses:

1. 'Without doing ~' — the action didn't happen before the main action:
• 朝ごはんを食べないで学校に行った。
(I went to school without eating breakfast.)
• 何も言わないで出ていった。(Left without saying anything.)

2. Soft negative request (casual 'please don't ~'):
• 心配しないで。(Don't worry.)
• 泣かないでよ。(Don't cry, okay?)

ないで vs なくて:
• ないで = 'without doing' or soft request
• なくて = 'because not' / reason-based negative te-form
